A brand designer based in Canggu, Bali.

For the past 10 years, I’ve helped businesses, startups, and growing brands build identities that actually mean something. Not just logos that look nice — but brand systems that feel intentional and built to last.

My work focuses on crafting distinctive visual identities, from logo design to complete brand systems and supporting graphics. Whether it's a new startup finding its voice or a local café refining its presence, I translate ideas into visuals that connect and create impact. I believe strong branding is clarity. It communicates who you are, what you stand for, and why people should care. That's what I help businesses define and design.
I'm always curious and love what I do.
